title: Yan Haklar Analitiği
description: Ek ödeme, sağlık sigortası, SGK ve bonus analizi — tür, departman ve trend bazlı.

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'SGK İşveren' AS label, SUM(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value, 1 AS sort_order FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşçi', SUM(SSK_ISCI_HISSESI), 2 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Sağlık Sigortası', SUM(HEALTH_INSURANCE_PREMIUM_WORKER + HEALTH_INSURANCE_PREMIUM_EMPLOYER), 3 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'İşsizlik Sigortası', SUM(ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISCI_HISSESI), 4 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Fazla Mesai', SUM(EXT_SALARY), 5 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) cost_item

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, SUM(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND EXT_SALARY > 0

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'Gelir Vergisi' AS label, SUM(GELIR_VERGISI) AS value, 1 AS sort_order FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Damga Vergisi', SUM(DAMGA_VERGISI), 2 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşçi Payı', SUM(SSK_ISCI_HISSESI), 3 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'İşsizlik İşçi', SUM(ISSIZLIK_ISCI_HISSESI), 4 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) ded_item

aggregate.select: CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value, COUNT(*) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1

collarType.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1
